name: education digest: a source whose guidance changed appears in best practices updated
command:
cat > d.jsonl <<'JEOF'
{"source_id":"azure-well-architected","section_id":"ops1","pillar":"operational-excellence","curriculum_phase":"2","delta_class":"best_practice_updated","summary":"resiliency review cadence","fetched_at":"2026-06-08T00:00:00Z"}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/curriculum-digest.sh" --deltas d.jsonl --out-dir out --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out/2026-06-08T120000Z.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.best_practices_updated.length===1 && j.best_practices_updated[0].source_id==="azure-well-architected"?0:1)' && echo best-ok 1>&2
